creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Support was added in this commit, which didn't make it into 13.0: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=59690eab572dde1176886bff7ed0c506df974e5e

It will be available in 13.1, though, due to be released in the next few days.

I'll close the PR given that this is already fixed, please feel free to re-open if necessary.
